allow: PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "from backend import main; print\('OK: app routes =', len\(main.app.routes\)\)")

PowerShell($env:LLM_API_KEY="sk-test-placeholder"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","backend.main" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "data\\smoke_err2.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "data\\smoke_out2.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $landing = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "LANDING status=$\($landing.StatusCode\) ok=$\($landing.Content -match 'landing-card'\)"; $hp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/home" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HOME status=$\($hp.StatusCode\) ok=$\($hp.Content -match 'home-cards'\)"; $bp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/build" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "BUILD status=$\($bp.StatusCode\) ok=$\($bp.Content -match 'ws-topbar'\)"; $pf = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/static/profile.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "PROFILE.JS status=$\($pf.StatusCode\)" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force })

PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "from backend import graph; g = graph.build_graph\(\); import json; print\('META:', json.dumps\(g['meta'], ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\('CATEGORIES:', len\(g['categories']\)\); print\('--- sample edges ---'\); [print\(f\\"  [{e['via']}] {e['from']} -> {e['to']}\\"\) for e in g['edges'][:12]]")

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\haisen\\Desktop\\revent\\agent; $env:PORT="8011"; Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "-m","backend.main" -RedirectStandardError "data\\smoke.err" -RedirectStandardOutput "data\\smoke.out" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8011/api/health"; Write-Output \("health ok="+$h.ok\) } catch { Write-Output \("health ERR: "+$_\) }; try { $b = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8011/build" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("build page status="+$b.StatusCode+" hasModes="+\($b.Content -match 'ws-modes'\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("build ERR: "+$_\) }; try { $s = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8011/static/stepflow.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("stepflow status="+$s.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("stepflow ERR: "+$_\) })
